title: hymenophyllum capense
intro: Hymenophyllum capense is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the "basket fern" or " basket fern of the eastern cape". This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing and reducing fever. In herbal preparations, Hymenophyllum capense is often used as a poultice or infusion to treat various ailments, and its leaves can be crushed and applied topically to skin conditions. Furthermore, its extracts have been studied for their antioxidant and antifungal activities, highlighting its potential in modern medicine.
